name: Apple Harvest Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, salt and 1/3 cup sugar. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles fine crumbs; press into the bottom of a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
2. Arrange the apple slices on top of crumbs; sprinkle with lemon juice.
3. Combine 1/3 cup sugar with cinnamon; sprinkle over apples.
4. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine remaining sugar with the rest of the ingredients.
6. Spoon mixture over baked apples; bake for another 20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Cut into squares while still warm.
